title: Arjun's Sandwich Adventure
synopsis: When Arjun's sandwich ingredients start disappearing, he and his friends turn into detectives to solve the mystery, leading to a hilarious discovery about who the real sandwich thief is.

pages.text: Arjun loved making sandwiches. Every day at lunch, he made the best sandwich ever. Today he got out his favorite things. Peanut butter, jelly, and soft white bread. "This will be yummy!" said Arjun.

illustration.description: A cheerful South Asian boy with dark hair and big bright eyes stands in a sunny kitchen. He's wearing a red t-shirt and has a big smile. Colorful sandwich ingredients are spread on the counter - jars of peanut butter and jelly, slices of bread. The kitchen has warm yellow walls and bright lighting.
illustration.alt: Arjun smiling in the kitchen with sandwich ingredients on the counter

pages.text: But when Arjun looked for his bread, it was gone! "That's weird," he said. He looked in the bag. Empty! He looked on the counter. Nothing! "Where did my bread go?"

illustration.description: Arjun looks confused and surprised, holding up an empty bread bag. His eyebrows are raised and his mouth is open in shock. The kitchen counter shows the empty bag and remaining ingredients. His expression is comically bewildered with wide eyes.
illustration.alt: Arjun looking confused while holding an empty bread bag

pages.text: Arjun's mom came into the kitchen. "What's wrong, sweetie?" she asked. "My bread is missing!" said Arjun. "Someone took it!" Mom smiled. "Maybe we have a sandwich thief," she said. "A sandwich thief?" gasped Arjun. "We need to find them!"

illustration.description: Arjun's mom, a kind South Asian woman with long black hair in a blue dress, stands next to Arjun in the kitchen. She has a gentle, amused expression while Arjun looks determined and excited, pointing his finger up like a detective. The warm kitchen setting continues with bright colors.
illustration.alt: Arjun and his mom talking in the kitchen, with Arjun looking determined

pages.text: Arjun put on his detective hat. Well, it was really his baseball cap. But it made him feel smart. He got his magnifying glass too. Actually, it was a spoon. But it worked just fine!

illustration.description: Arjun wearing a bright blue baseball cap backwards and holding up a large spoon like a magnifying glass. He has a serious detective expression with squinted eyes, trying to look professional. The kitchen background shows him in his 'investigation mode' with dramatic lighting.
illustration.alt: Arjun dressed as a detective with a baseball cap and spoon magnifying glass

pages.text: His friend Maya came over to play. She had curly red hair and freckles. "What are you doing?" she asked. "I'm Detective Arjun!" he said. "Someone stole my sandwich bread!" Maya's eyes got big. "Really? I want to help!" she said.

illustration.description: Maya, a girl with bright red curly hair, freckles, and big green eyes, stands at the front door wearing a yellow sundress. She looks excited and curious. Arjun stands nearby in his detective outfit, both children have animated, enthusiastic expressions. The doorway frames them with warm lighting.
illustration.alt: Maya arriving at the door while Arjun explains his detective mission

pages.text: Soon their friend Carlos came too. He had brown skin and wore glasses. "We heard about the sandwich thief!" he said. "Can we be detectives too?" "Yes!" said Arjun. "We need all the help we can get!"

illustration.description: Carlos, a Latino boy with brown skin, dark hair, and round glasses, joins the group. He's wearing a green striped shirt and looks eager to help. All three children stand together in the kitchen, looking like a team of young detectives with determined, excited expressions.
illustration.alt: Three friends - Arjun, Maya, and Carlos - standing together as detective partners

pages.text: The three friends looked everywhere. They checked under the table. They looked in all the cabinets. They even checked the refrigerator twice! "No bread anywhere," said Maya. "This thief is tricky!" said Carlos.

illustration.description: The three children are searching around the kitchen in funny positions - Maya looking under the table, Carlos peering into a cabinet, and Arjun checking inside the refrigerator. Their expressions are focused and determined, creating a humorous scene of intense investigation. Kitchen items are scattered around from their search.
illustration.alt: Three children searching everywhere in the kitchen for the missing bread

pages.text: Then Arjun saw something. "Look!" he said. "Crumbs!" There were tiny bread crumbs on the floor. They made a trail! "Follow the crumbs!" said Maya. The three detectives followed the trail. It went out of the kitchen and down the hall.

illustration.description: Arjun points excitedly at a trail of bread crumbs on the floor. The three children are crouched down, following the crumb trail with intense concentration. Their faces show excitement at finding this important clue. The trail of crumbs leads from the kitchen toward a hallway, creating a sense of mystery and adventure.
illustration.alt: The children discovering and following a trail of bread crumbs

pages.text: The trail went to Arjun's bedroom. It went under his bed! "The thief is under there!" whispered Carlos. They all got down on their hands and knees. They looked under the bed very carefully. What would they find?

illustration.description: Three children on their hands and knees, peering under Arjun's bed with surprised and curious expressions. The bedroom has colorful toys scattered around and bright blue walls. Their faces show anticipation and slight nervousness about what they might discover under the bed. Sunlight streams through a window.
illustration.alt: The three friends looking under Arjun's bed to find the sandwich thief

pages.text: Under the bed was Biscuit, Arjun's dog! His tail was wagging. His face had crumbs all over it. Next to him was the empty bread bag. "Biscuit!" laughed Arjun. "You're the sandwich thief!" Biscuit barked happily. He was not sorry at all!

illustration.description: A golden retriever dog with bread crumbs on his snout and whiskers sits under the bed, tail wagging enthusiastically. His big brown eyes look guilty but happy, and the empty bread bag is beside him. The three children are laughing and pointing at the silly dog, their faces full of joy and amusement at solving the mystery.
illustration.alt: Biscuit the dog under the bed with bread crumbs on his face, looking guilty but happy

pages.text: "Case solved!" said Detective Arjun. All three friends laughed and laughed. "Biscuit is a silly sandwich thief!" said Maya. "The silliest!" agreed Carlos. Mom came to see what was so funny. When they told her, she laughed too.

illustration.description: All three children are sitting on the floor laughing heartily while Biscuit the dog sits among them with his tongue hanging out, looking pleased with himself. Arjun's mom stands in the doorway, also smiling and laughing. The scene is warm and joyful with everyone enjoying the funny resolution to their mystery.
illustration.alt: Everyone laughing together at the silly solution to the sandwich mystery

pages.text: "Let's go get more bread," said Mom. "Then you can all make sandwiches together." "Hooray!" said the friends. "But this time," said Arjun, "we'll keep it away from Biscuit!" They all agreed. Even Biscuit wagged his tail. He thought that sounded like a good plan too!

illustration.description: The three happy children walk toward the kitchen with Mom, while Biscuit trots alongside them with his tail wagging. Everyone has big smiles and looks forward to making sandwiches together. The scene is bright and cheerful, showing the warm friendship and family moment. The kitchen can be seen in the background, ready for their sandwich-making adventure.
illustration.alt: The family and friends walking to the kitchen together, ready to make sandwiches

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What did Arjun want to make for lunch?
questions.explanation: Arjun loved making sandwiches and wanted to make one with peanut butter and jelly.

questions.question: What did Arjun use as a magnifying glass?
questions.explanation: Arjun used a spoon as his detective magnifying glass because he didn't have a real one.

questions.question: Who helped Arjun solve the mystery?
questions.explanation: His friends Maya and Carlos both came over and helped him be detectives to find the sandwich thief.

questions.question: How did they find the sandwich thief?
questions.explanation: The three detective friends followed a trail of bread crumbs that led them to Biscuit under the bed.

questions.question: Who was the sandwich thief?
questions.explanation: Biscuit, Arjun's dog, had eaten all the bread and was hiding under the bed with crumbs on his face.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words
pages.instructions: Choose the best word to complete each sentence from the story.

sentences.text: Arjun loved making _____ for lunch every day.
When Arjun looked for his bread, it was _____!
The three friends followed the trail of _____ down the hall.

pages.title: Detective Mystery
pages.instructions: Help solve the mystery by filling in the missing words!

sentences.text: _____ put on his detective hat to solve the mystery.
Under the bed was _____, Arjun's dog!
